title: Threads, Atomics, Data Races, and Safe Reclamation · C Contract Brief: Publication Lifetime
summary: A lock-free metrics cache removes nodes while readers still hold addresses and ordinary tests rarely reproduce the race. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem publication lifetime increment in threaded lifetime and reclamation proof. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Publish fully initialized objects with ordering and retain their lifetime until every reader is finished.
Select atomic operations and memory order from a stated synchronization proof instead of folklore.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
